svg.text: 🗺️ Autonomous Minecraft AI Agent — Full Project Workflow
Mineflayer + Ollama (qwen2.5-coder:7b) + Agentic Loop | 12 Phases | 29 Systems
Perception — See and Feel the World
Connect to Ollama | System Prompt | JSON Enforcement (3 Layers)
Autonomous Decision Loop | Hard-Coded Survival Reflexes | Self-Correction
World Map + POI + Death Location Tracking
High-Level Goals | Crafting State Machine | Combat | Auto-Eat | Auto-Armor
Farming | Death Recovery | Weather | Advanced Combat
Bot Personality | Emotion System | Performance Tracking | Multiplayer
❌ On failure → Feed error back to LLM (Critic)
Perception → Reflexes → LLM Reasoning → Action → Critic → Memory → Repeat ∞
Autonomous Minecraft AI Agent — Mineflayer + Ollama (qwen2.5-coder:7b) + RTX 4060 Laptop — Built for ASUS TUF F15
